decisionMaker.title: Decision Maker
decisionMaker.subtitle: Describe your dilemma, AI will give structured analysis based on your values and goals.
decisionMaker.examplePlaceholder: e.g. "Should I join a big tech or a startup?"

decisionMaker.askFollowUp: Ask follow-up or provide more details...

publicProfile.title: Public Profile
publicProfile.welcome: Welcome to my interactive profile. Feel free to ask questions about my background, skills, or experience.
publicProfile.agentIntro: Hello. I am the digital representative. I have access to his complete resume and professional history. How can I assist you?
publicProfile.askAnything: Ask me anything about my profile
publicProfile.agentContext: I have access to my complete professional history including work experience, skills, and career trajectory. Feel free to ask specific questions.
publicProfile.networkError: Network connection failed. Please check your connection and try again.

dataEditor.title: Data Editor
dataEditor.loadFailed: Failed to load configuration file. Please refresh and try again.
dataEditor.saveFailed: Save failed: invalid JSON format or server error

onboarding.title: Let's Get Started
onboarding.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to set up your profile
onboarding.importResumeDesc: Upload your PDF, Word, or Markdown resume and we'll extract your information automatically.
onboarding.chatWithAgentDesc: Answer a few questions and we'll build your profile together through a guided conversation.
onboarding.dragDrop: Drag and drop your resume here
onboarding.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload PDF, Word, or Markdown.
onboarding.parseFailed: Failed to parse resume. Please try again or enter manually.
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.agentGreeting: Hi! I'm your personal AI assistant. I'll help you set up your profile by asking a few questions.
onboarding.askRole: What is your professional role or title?
onboarding.askBio: Tell me a bit about yourself.
onboarding.askGoals: What are you currently working on or focusing on?
onboarding.profileComplete: Great! I've collected all the information. Click 'Save Profile' to continue.
onboarding.chatError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Your personal wiki. Upload documents and the AI will maintain summaries, entities, and cross-references.
knowledge.dropFiles: Drop files here or click to browse
knowledge.queryPlaceholder: Ask a question about your knowledge base...
knowledge.emptyDesc: Upload documents to start building your personal wiki. The AI will create summaries and maintain cross-references.
